creator: rwatson@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Mon, 28 Jan 2008, Jonathan Chen wrote:

> On Sun, Jan 27, 2008 at 12:44:23PM +0000, rwatson@FreeBSD.org wrote:
> [..]
>> If you boot a 7.0 kernel/modules with 6.x userspace, does the problem still 
>> occur?
>
> Would you have the application packages for 6.x readily available for me to 
> do this? I don't have any 6.x machines available to do a build for it.

I'm catching up on old bug reports, and it seems I lost track of this one. 
What I'd basically like to do, at this point, is confirm whether:

(1) The problem still occurs on the latest 6-STABLE
(2) The problem occurs on 7-STABLE at all

The multicast address stuff is significantly changed in 7.x, so it wouldn't 
surprise me if the bug was eliminated (replaced with new bugs?) in the new 
code.  It would be helpful to estabish whether that is the case so that I'm 
looking for problems in the right places -- hence my request to see if the 
problem occurs with the same applications/etc but new kernel.  If anyone has 
any further information along these lines, that would be most helpful.

Thanks,

Robert N M Watson
Computer Laboratory
University of Cambridge
